title: DeepInfra Joins Hugging Face Inference Providers
summary: DeepInfra is now part of Hugging Face's Inference Providers, making it easier to deploy AI models. This collaboration simplifies running models for developers and researchers.
body:
DeepInfra has officially joined Hugging Face's Inference Providers. This means developers and researchers can now deploy AI models on DeepInfra's infrastructure directly through Hugging Face. The integration streamlines the process, reducing the complexity of running models in production.

For everyday users, this collaboration means faster and more reliable access to AI tools. If you've ever struggled with setting up AI models, this partnership makes it easier to get started. Think of it like having a one-stop shop for all your AI needs.

If you're a developer or researcher, you can start using DeepInfra on Hugging Face today. Simply navigate to the Inference Providers section and select DeepInfra. Keep an eye out for more integrations and updates as the collaboration grows.
